results.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
results.abstract: Large pre-trained language models have been shown to store factual knowledge in their parameters. However, their ability to access and precisely manipulate knowledge is limited. We explore a general-purpose fine-tuning recipe for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) — models which combine pre-trained parametric and non-parametric memory for language generation.
results.takeaway: RAG models achieve state-of-the-art results on open-domain QA benchmarks by combining parametric knowledge with retrieved evidence.

results.title: Real-Time Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Agent-Based AI Systems
results.abstract: We propose a real-time RAG architecture for agent-based AI systems that reduces latency by 40% compared to naive retrieval-augmented approaches.

results.title: A Survey on Retrieval-Augmented Text Generation
results.abstract: This survey provides a comprehensive overview of retrieval-augmented text generation methods, covering retrieval models, generation architectures, and training strategies.
